'''鈭歜-k-ch''' ('''kabakach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:limbec|limbec]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-k-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:limbec|limbec]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-k-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kabakach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibakach|thibakach]] || [[word:jibakach|jibakach]] || [[word:shibakach|shibakach]] || [[word:kibakach|kibakach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubakach|thuthubakach]] || [[word:jujubakach|jujubakach]] || [[word:shushubakach|shushubakach]] || [[word:kukubakach|kukubakach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubakach|thubakach]] || [[word:jubakach|jubakach]] || [[word:shubakach|shubakach]] || [[word:kubakach|kubakach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubakach|thubakach]] || [[word:jubakach|jubakach]] || [[word:shubakach|shubakach]] || [[word:kubakach|kubakach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebakach|thebakach]] || [[word:jebakach|jebakach]] || [[word:shebakach|shebakach]] || [[word:kebakach|kebakach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobakach|thothobakach]] || [[word:jojobakach|jojobakach]] || [[word:shoshobakach|shoshobakach]] || [[word:kokobakach|kokobakach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobakach|thobakach]] || [[word:jobakach|jobakach]] || [[word:shobakach|shobakach]] || [[word:kobakach|kobakach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobakach|thobakach]] || [[word:jobakach|jobakach]] || [[word:shobakach|shobakach]] || [[word:kobakach|kobakach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bakach|bakach]] || [[word:bakach|bakach]] || [[word:bakach|bakach]] || [[word:bakach|bakach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bakach|bakach]] || [[word:bakach|bakach]] || [[word:bakach|bakach]] || [[word:bakach|bakach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bakach|bakach]] || [[word:bakach|bakach]] || [[word:bakach|bakach]] || [[word:bakach|bakach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bakach|bakach]] || [[word:bakach|bakach]] || [[word:bakach|bakach]] || [[word:bakach|bakach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙bakach|th忙bakach]] || [[word:j忙bakach|j忙bakach]] || [[word:sh忙bakach|sh忙bakach]] || [[word:k忙bakach|k忙bakach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabakach|thathabakach]] || [[word:jajabakach|jajabakach]] || [[word:shashabakach|shashabakach]] || [[word:kakabakach|kakabakach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabakach|thabakach]] || [[word:jabakach|jabakach]] || [[word:shabakach|shabakach]] || [[word:kabakach|kabakach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabakach|thabakach]] || [[word:jabakach|jabakach]] || [[word:shabakach|shabakach]] || [[word:kabakach|kabakach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabakach|shabakach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabakach|goshabakach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabakach|gokishabakach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabakachn眉|shabakachn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabakachnkn眉|goshabakachnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabakachn眉|gokishabakachn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabakachsh毛|shabakachsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabakachnksh毛|goshabakachnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabakachsh毛|gokishabakachsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabakachro|shabakachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabakachnkro|goshabakachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabakachro|gokishabakachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabakachmu|shabakachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabakachnkmu|goshabakachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabakachmu|gokishabakachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabakachsher|shabakachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabakachnksher|goshabakachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabakachsher|gokishabakachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabakachng|shabakachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabakachnkng|goshabakachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabakachng|gokishabakachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabakachya|shabakachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabakachnkya|goshabakachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabakachya|gokishabakachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabakachyam|shabakachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabakachnkyam|goshabakachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabakachyam|gokishabakachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabakachn眉sh毛|shabakachn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabakachnkn眉sh毛|goshabakachnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabakachn眉sh毛|gokishabakachn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabakachn眉ro|shabakachn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabakachnkn眉ro|goshabakachnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabakachn眉ro|gokishabakachn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabakachn眉mu|shabakachn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabakachnkn眉mu|goshabakachnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabakachn眉mu|gokishabakachn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabakachsh毛n眉|shabakachsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabakachnksh毛n眉|goshabakachnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabakachsh毛n眉|gokishabakachsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabakachsh毛ro|shabakachsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabakachnksh毛ro|goshabakachnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabakachsh毛ro|gokishabakachsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabakachsh毛mu|shabakachsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabakachnksh毛mu|goshabakachnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabakachsh毛mu|gokishabakachsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabakachron眉|shabakachron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabakachnkron眉|goshabakachnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabakachron眉|gokishabakachron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabakachrosh毛|shabakachrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabakachnkrosh毛|goshabakachnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabakachrosh毛|gokishabakachrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabakachromu|shabakachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabakachnkromu|goshabakachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabakachromu|gokishabakachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabakachmun眉|shabakachmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabakachnkmun眉|goshabakachnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabakachmun眉|gokishabakachmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabakachmush毛|shabakachmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabakachnkmush毛|goshabakachnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabakachmush毛|gokishabakachmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabakachmuro|shabakachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabakachnkmuro|goshabakachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabakachmuro|gokishabakachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
